task: Driver Hub Requests — Manager/Owner approve/deny cash advance requests; approve creates a settlement deduction via createSettlementDeduction()

design.double_approve_guard: cash_advance_requests.status pending/under_review -> approved/denied under FOR UPDATE (mirrors approvePendingDeduction escrow pattern)
design.no_raw_sql_deduction_inserts: approve path inserts the deduction ONLY through createSettlementDeduction() (sourceType=cash_advance_repayment, no sourcePendingId)

lane_lock: apps/backend/src/cash-advances/ + Driver Hub frontend only; no accounting/billing/detention files
note: Imports (read-only) createSettlementDeduction from driver-finance/deductions.service.ts merged in PR #683. Existing office approve flow in driver-finance is left untouched; both flows share the same pending->approved status guard so a request can be actioned only once across either surface.
